title: Scaling bio-based SAF to meet Europe’s climate ambitions [Promoted Content]
summary_full: As the European Union stands at the precipice of its first major compliance milestone under the ReFuelEU Aviation regulation, the association representing producers of bio-based aviation fuel (HEFA) in the EU looks forward. By 2030, the mandate for Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) will jump to 6% and 20% by 2035. These targets sound modest until […]
